title: Create Creation
description: A rudimentary way to generate command blocks in survival mode
body:
# This mod has been reworked!
## **WARNING!** Updating the mod from 1.x.x to later versions will remove ALL blocks and items from the mod! Backup your world(s) first!
This mod gives the player the ability to generate Command Blocks in survival mode in a rather janky way.

It now adds two items and two blocks. This time, only one will actually get you the Command Block. As for the other one...well that's supposed to be a surprise.

First you need four **Gilded Nether Stars**, which each take a Nether Star and four Gold Ingots. Crafting these into a Lodestone will give you the **Nether Catalyst**. Place the block, right-click it, and watch the magic happen. The rest of the info (and some images in the gallery) is a spoiler.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Nether Catalyst is unstable, and will simply explode upon use. Instead, you need to combine four Ender Pearls with a Popped Chorus Fruit to get a **Null Casing**. Crafting four of these with four Redstone and the Nether Catalyst will give you the **Ender Catalyst**. This block, upon right-clicking it, will transform into a Command block

</details>

<details>
<summary>Old Description</summary>

It only adds one item and one block, both of which are important to the creation of the command block. First, one must craft at least six **Unstable Catalyst Fragments**, which takes an Emerald, a Nether Star, and two Nether Quartz each. After which, craft all six of them with a Diamond Block to obtain the **Stabilized Catalyst**. Finally, place the block where you want the Command Block, right-click it, and undergo a dramatic sequence that will ultimately turn the Catalyst into the Command Block.

</details>

This mod was made with MCreator. Yes it's very small. This mod was made for a roleplay scenario that involved some programmer art, some creativity, and some terror, which made the Command Block useful for reasons. [*Cough cough*](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod).
